technical_replicate: Based on the MS data from three replicates...
experimental_design: two sample groups (mock and GalNAz-labeled samples)...
number_of_fractions: fractionated using an Agilent HPLC system into 14 individual fractions...
number_of_technical_replicates: Based on the MS data from three replicates...
number_of_samples: 3 biological replicates and 14 fractions = 3 * 14 = 42 total samples.
